  3. 2D/3D Artist / Illustrator
  4. 2D Animation

2D Animator

Art of Spin
Підписатись
Зберегти
Сховати
$$$
Продукт

As a Middle 2D Animator, you will shape the motion language of our games — from character animations to environmental effects and visual feedback systems.

You will work closely with Game Designers, Mathematicians, Developers, and Artists to ensure that animation enhances mechanics, pacing, and emotional impact.

This role requires both strong classical animation skills and practical experience in slot or gambling projects.

 

Responsibilities

  • Create high-quality 2D character and object animations using Spine.
  • Design and implement environmental animations to enhance in-game visuals.
  • Develop visual effects with particle systems (e.g., Particle Designer, Particle Illusion, Magic Particles).
  • Prepare and finalize assets for animation implementation.
  • Continuously improve the visual polish and quality of animations.
  • Collaborate with the team, engaging in constructive feedback loops.
  • Communicate effectively in intermediate spoken English.

 

Requirements

  • 3+ years of experience as a 2D Animator.
  • 2+ years of hands-on experience with Spine.
  • Experience working on slot games or gambling projects.
  • Strong proficiency in Adobe Photoshop and Adobe After Effects.
  • Solid understanding of classical animation principles (timing, squash & stretch, anticipation, etc.).
  • Experience working with game interfaces.
  • Familiarity with JIRA or similar project management tools.
  • Strong portfolio demonstrating completed animation projects.
  • Ability to give and receive constructive feedback.
  • Intermediate level of spoken English.

 

Would Be a Plus

  • Experience in iGaming or Gaming industry.
  • Strong understanding of animation psychology in gambling products.
  • Experience optimizing animations for performance.
  • Knowledge of UI motion systems.

 

What We Offer

• Direct influence on product economics and player experience.

• Real ownership of game mathematics and long-term performance.

• Competitive compensation.

• Professional growth inside a product-driven gambling studio.

• Flexible working format.

• Strong, collaborative team environment.

Необхідний досвід роботи в галузі

Gambling 2 роки

Вимоги до володіння мовами

Англійська B1 – Середній
Spine, 2D Animator, Adobe After Effects

Про компанію Art of Spin

Art of Spin is an ambitious and fast-growing online casino games provider, delivering engaging and visually stunning experiences. Specializing in slots, quick-win formats, and in-game gamification, we combine captivating animation with compelling gameplay to keep players immersed. 

 

Innovation, creativity, and a player-first mindset drive everything we do — from building unique gaming content to providing reliable technical solutions. Committed to quality, flexibility, and regulatory compliance, we create lasting partnerships that fuel sustainable growth. 

 

Join us in reshaping the future of online casino entertainment — where every spin is a new adventure.
